Variables.Name: Name
Variables.Description: Name of the original node. We don't allow to change this. This is used for identity.

Variables.Name: ParentName
Variables.Description: We save Parent Node but if the parent node is removed, it will reset to root

Variables.Name: Transform
Variables.Description: Absolute transform of the node. Hoping to use this data in the future to render

Variables.Name: DisplayName
Variables.Description: This is Display Name where it will be used to display in Retarget Manager. This name has to be unique.
